pitchSequence.description: Comebacker to the mound; McKeever handles it and tosses to first

notes: Out number one. Stipe was a strikeout victim in the third. Only one pitch described; pitch type not specified by broadcaster. Scoring: 1-3.

pitchSequence.description: Low slider; Flores takes an awkward hack at it; swinging strike
Roller to third; Gomez has it and fires across to first to get Flores

notes: Out number two. Flores grounded out in the third as well. Count was 1-1 when ball was put in play. Pitch 3 type unspecified; contact made off what appears to be a third pitch on 1-1 count. Scoring: 5-3.

pitchSequence.description: Offspeed pitch runs high; ball; count 1-1
Fell off to the left; foul ball; count 1-2
Files another one off; foul ball; count remains 1-2
Fastball just misses high; ball; count 2-2
Fastball misses low; ball; count runs full (3-2)
Payoff pitch hit in the air to right field; Lamont drifting back makes the catch; inning over

notes: Out number three; ends the inning. Topanga was 0-for-2 on the evening. Full count (3-2) before flyout to right. This is the 13th consecutive Loon retired by McKeever. Score remains Bombers 1, Loons 0 after six innings.
